top_signals.title: Oil market at 'tank bottoms' in Asia, and Europe isn't far behind, Carlyle's Currie says
top_signals.summary: Oil markets are nearing minimum operating levels in Asia, with Europe likely next and the U.S. potentially facing shortages by July, said Carlyle's Jeff Currie.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
